questions.questionText: For the product $(1 + x)^2 (1 + y)^3 (1 + z)^4 (1 + w)^5$, when it is expanded, find the sum of the coefficients of all terms whose total degree is 12.

questions.questionText:
Write the binomial expansion of

arranging the terms in descending powers of $x$. Assume that the coefficients of the first three terms (in this order) are in arithmetic progression.

Then, the number of terms in the expansion which have integral powers of $x$ is :
